'''Yang Metal Rat''' is the 37th of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 庚 Kanoe (yang metal, the gaia-aligned face of occultation), and its branch is 子 Ne, the [[Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, the stem's metal generates the branch's water, a relationship of nourishment.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yin Earth Pig]] (node 36) and [[Yin Metal Ox]] (node 38).

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Kanoe (庚)]] — yang metal
* '''Branch:''' [[Rat (zodiac)|Rat (子)]] — yang water
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Gaia]]
* '''Element-season:''' occultation

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yin Earth Pig]] — preceding node
* [[Yin Metal Ox]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q904964}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
